title: Redstone Spawner
description: This mod allows you to control monster spawners using Redstone, simple as that!
body:
This mod changes Vanilla spawners to allow you to control them just using Redstone.

If the spawner is not powered, it will work normally, if it is powered, the spawning process will stop until you unpower it.

This mod is mandatory on the server side.
Client side is optional since it just removes particles and stops spining
